lines: Martha brushes packed ash from a grave marker without touching the cut letters.
"Speak the name before you ask about the ground. The order matters here."

choices.label: Ask how South Measure records its dead

lines: "I cut the people a family names, starting with household and chosen kin. Cause needs permission, while admission status never enters the stone."
"The Remnant book writes unentered. Stone has room for the person instead."
"A bridge crew died holding a relief hook above floodwater so children could cross the line."
"No city claimed the crew. South Measure claimed the story."
